items.content_html: All my dotfiles, using Neovim with PowerShell Core in the Windows Terminal along with fzf and a wrapper for it for fast navigation. Additionally, there is a quick setup for Firefox with Tridactyl and for a Tiling Window Manager using Komorebi with Yasb and AutoHotkey.
items.title: ConnorSweeneyDev/Windows11Workflow: All my dotfiles, using Neovim with PowerShell Core in the Windows Terminal along with fzf and a wrapper for it for fast navigation. Additionally, there is a quick setup for Firefox with Tridactyl and for a Tiling Window Manager using Komorebi with Yasb and AutoHotkey.

items.content_html: Transform your CapsLock into an AI key! This AutoHotkey app puts powerful AI capabilities right at your fingertips, supercharging your Windows workflow with instant AI assistance for writing, research, translation, and more. Boost your productivity with just a few keystrokes! 🚀🧠⌨️
